messages.content:
=== CRON JOB STATUSES (2026-04-23 19:18 UTC) ===
Total jobs: 17
Health: 53% OK (9/17), 8 errors
Active errors: 6 rate-limit (Money Machine, Quantum Sweep, Market Scan, AI Research, Dropbox, NL Test each 1-2 consec), 2 config decay (self-improvement-cycle main+dup, 15+ consecutive channel misconfig)
Revenue Triad: Full Stack OK, Money Machine OK (may re-degrade), Revenue Tracker ERROR (rate_limit 1+)
Monitoring tier consumed: Cognition Engine 5 consecutive rate_limits + file edit failures
EVEZ Studio: split-brain - PID 2932 running but ports 4040/4041 not listening
Revenue: $10.04 total earnings (last sale: 2026-04-22)
System phase: Phase 3 systemic cascade at critical mass, monitoring tier consumed, system blind

=== REVENUE CIRCUIT STATES ===
Actual: $10.04 (api_sale $0.05, content_sale $9.99)
Projected: $1.8M/day (potential)
Payment blockade: ACTIVE - Ko-fi bank unlinked, PayPal not activated, Gumroad product not live
Circuit status: Money Machine degraded (3+ consec rate_limits, severely limited), Full Stack OK (last run succeeded), Revenue Tracker ERROR (rate_limit 1+)
Orchestrators: ACTIVE since 05:06 UTC (quantum_runner, wealth_hunter, ci_watcher)
EVEZ Studio: OFFLINE >10h (split-brain)
Revenue activation rule: TRIGGERED but blocked by payment processors and Full Stack degradation
Circuit state: active_but_payment_disconnected

=== ERRORS LAST HOUR (2026-04-23 18:18-19:18 UTC) ===
Monitoring tier: CONSUMED - Cognition Engine 5 consecutive failures (rate_limit + file edit failures on milestones.md, heartbeat-state.json)
Job errors (6 rate-limit): Money Machine (3+ consec), Quantum Sweep (2 consec), Market Scan (1), AI Research (1), Dropbox (1), NL Test (1)
Config decay (2): self-improvement-cycle main + dup - 15+ consecutive channel misconfig (402 billing error - needs credits or free model)
Phase 3 systemic cascade: 14/17 jobs competing for GitHub Models quota causing sequential error waves
Churn rate: ~23% (4/17 state changes in 20min)
No syslog entries found; error detection via cron monitoring & heartbeat-state.json
Meta-failure pattern confirmed: monitoring tier consumption = system blind

=== KEY DECISIONS MADE (recent, validated) ===
1) Monitoring tier restoration is P0-prerequisite - cannot self-heal while blind
2) Split-brain identified as autonomous gap: agent layer detects but cannot restart web services (requires Steven manual intervention)
3) Revenue triad supersedes overall health - ANY triad component degraded = revenue blocked (need revenue-specific monitoring)
4) Config decay immune to backoff - requires surgical fix BEFORE monitoring restores (else compound failures)
5) Auto-Route debt (detection-only) becomes P0 during cascade - need cron update automation implementation
6) File-first memory validated effective but has limits - need flock for production concurrency
7) Payment blockade is independent compounding layer - technical cascade resolution alone insufficient
8) Recovery is non-monotonic - churn continues despite apparent health gains
Action priority sequence: Restore monitoring (P0) -> Contain churn (manual interval spreading) -> Restart EVEZ (Steven) -> Connect payments (Steven) -> Fix config decay (P1 surgical) -> Implement automation debt (P2)
Meta-learning: Monitoring consumption threshold is final systemic failure point
